name: memory-graph
description: Knowledge graph (global route + per-page ego panel) — a DOM+SVG renderer with radial layout, pan/zoom/drag, and theme-token styling.
notes: MemoryGraphView is a purpose-built DOM+SVG renderer (no canvas lib) so page icons render natively and colours stay theme-token dynamic. Regenerate with scripts/generate-slice-manifests.mjs after edits.
